description: Lock Glass-Blowing Workshops to Roman workshop-scale glass production enabled by blown-glass technique and general glassmaking, without requiring formal collegia.

checks.reason: The launch-quality scope is first-century CE Roman workshop production, not the earlier invention of free blowing.
The node is defined by workshop use of free-blown and mold-blown forming techniques.
Workshop-scale blown vessels still require the broader glassmaking material and furnace base.
The inspected sources support skilled craftsmen and workshops but not formal collegia as a direct prerequisite.
